description_long: This object is a whimsical, stylized avocado figure with a textured, dark green skin and a smooth, rounded shape. The front features a cartoonish face painted in a Day of the Dead skull style, with large black eye sockets, a stitched mouth, and a small curl on the forehead. The avocado's interior is depicted in a light green color, with a large brown pit at the center of its belly. It holds a white bottle in one hand and a blue spoon in the other, both of which are sculpted and painted as part of the figure. The arms and legs are short, black, and rounded, giving the object a playful, toy-like appearance. The back and sides are covered in a bumpy, pebbled texture, mimicking real avocado skin.
description: A playful, cartoonish avocado figure with a Day of the Dead skull face, holding a bottle and spoon, featuring a textured dark green skin and a large brown pit.
description_view_0: The back view shows the bumpy, dark green skin texture with no visible face or accessories.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the profile of the skull face, the bottle in the left hand, and the spoon extending forward.
description_view_2: The front view displays the full skull face, both arms holding a bottle and spoon, and the prominent brown pit.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the spoon in the right hand and the side profile of the face and pit.
